Caspar David Friedrich

7 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Footbridge with Cross before Trees at a River
by Caspar David Friedrich
Germany, 19th century · c.1803 · etching
Scene of a Fire
by Caspar David Friedrich
Germany · 1802 · Etching on paper
The Woman with the Spider Web between Bare Trees
by Caspar David Friedrich
Germany, early 19th Century · 1803 · woodcut
Young Man Lying on a Grave
by Caspar David Friedrich
Germany · 1803–1804 · Woodcut on paper
Woman with Spider's Web Between Bare Trees
by Caspar David Friedrich
Germany · 1803 · Woodcut on ivory wove paper
Statue of the Madonna in the Mountains
by Caspar David Friedrich
Germany · romantic · 1804 · Brush and black ink and gray wash
Wanderer above the Sea of Fog
by Caspar David Friedrich
German Romanticism · 1818
A man stands on a rocky peak, his back to us, looking into swirling cloud. Romanticism in one image — the sublime, and the lone self against it.
←Nake, Frieder Francis Frith→
